description: Medusa is a digital commerce platform and framework for building customizable ecommerce applications. It offers self-hosted or cloud-hosted commerce backends, admin/storefront APIs, and Medusa Cloud tooling for deployment and operations.
summary: Medusa exposes two self-hosted REST APIs (Admin and Store, each with downloadable OpenAPI specs), a Medusa Cloud CLI (`mcloud`), and an authenticated remote Docs MCP server.
